scripts.test: bun --bun vitest run --coverage && bun run scripts/coverage-check.ts && cd dashboard && bun run ut
scripts.test:coverage: bun --bun vitest run --coverage && bun run scripts/coverage-check.ts && cd dashboard && bun run ut
scripts.ut: bun --bun vitest run --coverage && bun run scripts/coverage-check.ts && cd dashboard && bun run ut
scripts.ut:scripts: bun --bun vitest run --coverage && bun run scripts/coverage-check.ts
scripts.lint: eslint --max-warnings=0 . --ext .ts && cd dashboard && bun run lint
scripts.precommit: bun run test:coverage && bun run lint
